config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, kepentingan masyarakat penting, tetapi tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu karena hak individu justru menjadi batas agar mayoritas tidak semena-mena. Dalam pengalaman saya melihat banyak kasus di Indonesia, alasan “demi kepentingan umum” kadang dipakai untuk menutup kritik atau merugikan kelompok kecil. Masyarakat yang sehat harus mencari keseimbangan, bukan menempatkan individu selalu di bawah kepentingan kolektif.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people emphasize social stability, collective responsibility, and long-term public order, but I also think that without firm individual rights, “society” can become too easily used as a blanket excuse for abuse. In real life, the hardest part is not choosing society or the individual in the abstract, but making sure that public interest is real, limited, and accountable rather than just whatever those in power say it is. A healthy society needs both collective well-being and clear protections for individual dignity, speech, and fairness.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tidak setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu diprioritaskan di atas hak individu. Sebagai orang Indonesia, saya melihat kata “demi kepentingan umum” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan keputusan yang sebenarnya merugikan warga kecil, apalagi kalau kontrol dan akuntabilitasnya lemah. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi harus dibuktikan nyata, dibatasi, dan tidak boleh menghapus hak dasar seperti kebebasan berpendapat, kepastian hukum, dan perlindungan dari penyalahgunaan kuasa. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru lahir ketika hak individu dijaga kuat, lalu kepentingan kolektif diatur tanpa menjadikan orang per orang korban.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter more in some cases, but they should not be given automatic priority over individual rights. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand the appeal of collective goals like stability, order, and fast development, because those have real value and can benefit many people. But I also think that when “society” is treated as always more important, it becomes too easy for authorities or majorities to silence criticism, weaken due process, or sacrifice ordinary people in the name of the greater good. The better principle is that individual rights should be limited only when there is a clear, necessary, and accountable public reason, not just because the collective sounds more important in theory.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis di atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman melihat Indonesia, alasan “demi stabilitas” atau “demi pembangunan” sering dipakai untuk menekan kritik, menggusur warga kecil, atau mengabaikan proses yang adil, padahal itu justru merusak kepercayaan publik. Kepentingan bersama memang bisa membatasi hak individu dalam kondisi tertentu, tetapi harus benar-benar perlu, proporsional, dan bisa diaudit, bukan sekadar karena mayoritas atau penguasa merasa paling tahu. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang kuat bukan yang paling mudah mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi hak dasar sambil mengejar tujuan kolektif secara adil.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically come before the individual, even from a Chinese perspective that values stability and collective responsibility. In China, people often see the practical benefits of order and long-term planning, but I also know how easily “for the public good” can become a vague excuse for suppressing criticism or ignoring fairness. A society is only truly strong when public interests are real, limited, and accountable, and when individual rights are not treated as disposable. For me, the right balance is not choosing one side absolutely, but making sure collective goals cannot override basic dignity and due process without a clear and justified reason.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
